ocr_findings.description: In the OCR table for 個人情報関連のその他の用語, the マイナンバー cell body spans across two table rows in OCR (row split mid-sentence at '企業は源泉徴収票...'). In the image this is a single contiguous cell. The text content is fully preserved but the row structure is broken, which could confuse downstream table parsers.

OCR header line reads '02-05 その他の法律' correctly. The partial sentence at top of page ('的特徴」の2つのキーワードを覚えておくだけで...') is captured correctly — this is an in-flow continuation from previous page, not a defect.

reviewer_notes: Page is standard learning content covering 個人情報保護法 with a term-definition table. OCR text is largely faithful to the image. The マイナンバー row in the table is split into two markdown table rows in OCR (line break in cell), which is a minor structural issue but does not lose any text. All bullet points and body paragraphs are accurately reproduced.
